name: CCELL - Palm SE Battery
summary: The CCELL Palm SE combines elegance, performance, and comfort in a compact palm-sized design.
description: The CCELL Palm SE combines elegance, performance, and comfort in a compact palm-sized design. Built for both style and functionality, this premium 510-thread battery delivers smooth, consistent hits and gives users a clear view of their oil with its open window feature. Works with most 510 concentrate cartridges. *Cartridges sold separately. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
